# Design-Build-Test-Learn

## Draft focus

Describe DBTL as both an engineering workflow and a software architecture problem.

## Starter example

```{python}
dbtl = ["design", "build", "test", "learn"]
{step: i for i, step in enumerate(dbtl, start=1)}
```

## Draft note

This chapter can later link to automation pipelines, metadata, and iteration tracking.
